scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/build.ts --check && node --check dist/youtube-auto-resume.user.js && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/ads.test.ts tests/fabAurora.test.ts tests/panelMount.test.ts tests/playbackState.test.ts tests/player.test.ts tests/quality.test.ts tests/settings.test.ts tests/version.test.ts
